text.title: Traceability Tooling Comparison (Jira / ADO / Polarion) Report Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) that pins the shape of a valid report artefact. Subagents validate against this before returning.

example.note: Owner is plural pronoun, required fields missing or empty.

forbidden.pattern: `owner` is plural pronoun (`team`, `we`, `us`) or empty string
